TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Sikihiki Itiniay i Zhuoxi Cen no Hualien ko Sikihiki a niyaro', 56 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 205 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 93% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 190 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 7% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 15 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun76%, Amis10%, Puyuma1%, roma4%.
S.PHON: sikińßiki itiniaj i *ńßo~u~uo~uxi ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u sikińßiki a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un**%, amis**%, po~u~ujo~u~uma*%, ro~uma*%.
S.FORM: Sikihiki Itiniay i Zhuoxi Cen no Hualien ko Sikihiki a niyaro', 56 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 205 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 93% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 190 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 7% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 15 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun76%, Amis10%, Puyuma1%, roma4%.
S.PHON: sikińßiki itiniaj i *ńßo~u~uo~uxi ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u sikińßiki a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un**%, amis**%, po~u~ujo~u~uma*%, ro~uma*%.
